Okay,我现在需要解决 this classic river crossing puzzle. The farmer needs to get a fox, a chicken，and一袋 grain across the river. The boat只能载他和一个 item at一次。If他 leaves任何 item alone，the fox will eat the chicken，或者 the鸡 will eat the grain。如何 can the farmer safely get everything across？

Alright，让我 think through this step by step。

【问题】
A farmer has a fox,a chicken，和一 bag of grain。他 needs to cross a river in a boat that can only carry him和 one物品 at一次。如果 left alone，the fox will eat the chicken，and the chicken will eat the grain。How can the farmer get everything across safely？翻译 to中文





























【question】
一个 farmer has一只狐狸，一只鸡，和一袋 grain。他 needs to cross一条河 in a boat that只能 carry他和一个物品每次。如果 left alone，the狐狸会吃 the鸡，和鸡会 eat the grain。如何 can the farmer get everything across safely？请 translate to中文





















【回答】
农民 needs to transport fox、鸡、and grain across river using boat只能 carry one item每次。关键 is the狐狸会 eat鸡，鸡会 eat grain if left alone
